dealerSubtitle: The Next Generation of High-Capacity Drone Application

specs.label: Acres Per Day
specs.description: Can cover 1,200 to 1,600 acres per day — complete large-scale spraying or spreading operations quickly.

specs.label: Application Speed
specs.description: With spray swath width of 45–60 feet — covering a greater width at a faster speed.

specs.label: Tank
specs.description: 330-pound dry tank / 330-pound maximum payload — eliminates the need for multiple specialized machines.

specs.label: + Forward LiDAR
specs.description: Engineered for tough terrain access. Easily operates in uneven, muddy, or otherwise inaccessible areas.

msrp.label: Starting MSRP
msrp.disclaimer: Additional configurations available — call for details.
msrp.source: Terraplex MAP policy. Confirmed by Jack Schroeder 2026-03-30.
